name: duplicateSheet
description: Duplicates a sheet (tab) within a spreadsheet, copying all values, formulas, formatting, validations, and conditional formatting. Use getSpreadsheetInfo to find the numeric sheet ID.

spreadsheetId.description: The spreadsheet ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Sheets URL.

sheetId.description: The numeric sheet ID to duplicate. Use getSpreadsheetInfo to find sheet IDs.

newSheetName.description: Name for the duplicated sheet. If omitted, Google auto-names it "Copy of <original>".
